name: prisma-la-puissance-du-sql-sans-la-complexite-des-requetes
description: This workshop introduces Prisma ORM through 3 progressive mini-projects built in a single project. The schema evolves at each step, just like in a real codebase.
author: Ilan LP

scripts.test: npx tsx tests/mini-project-1.ts && npx tsx tests/mini-project-2.ts && npx tsx tests/mini-project-3.ts
